title: Chapter 997 Summary
main_description: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
key_events: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
